name: Brain CT Venogram
description: Brain CT venography for evaluation of cerebral venous system and dural sinuses

findings.technique: CT venography of the cerebral venous system was performed following intravenous contrast.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Dural Sinuses
sections.content: Superior sagittal sinus: [patent / no filling defect]. Transverse sinuses: [patent / symmetric]. Sigmoid sinuses: [patent].

sections.name: Internal Cerebral Veins
sections.content: Internal cerebral veins: [normal / patent]. No thrombosis.

sections.name: Deep Venous System
sections.content: Basal vein of Rosenthal: [normal]. Straight sinus: [patent]. No deep venous thrombosis.

impression:
1. No venous sinus thrombosis.
2. Normal CT venogram.
author: RadReport Templates
